title: Find My Device - Playing Tone - app in the background
scenario: Find My Device tone stops when app is sent to background and does not resume upon reopening
steps: Open the Find My Device app.
Start playing the Find My Device tone.
Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Observe whether the tone continues or stops.
Reopen the Find My Device app.
Observe the state of the Play button and whether the tone is heard.
expected: The tone should continue playing even when the app is in the background, and when the app is reopened, the tone should still be playing or the Play button should indicate that the tone is active.
